name: taobao-api-boundary-and-nonblocking-config

implementation_evidence.crawler_nonblocking_config: default crawler configuration validates with empty Taobao API credentials
implementation_evidence.credential_guard: real non-mock API path returns success=false with order_api_credentials_missing and null metrics when credentials are absent
implementation_evidence.pagination_contract: TaobaoOrderApiCollector supports an injected paged API fetcher and loops until a short page
implementation_evidence.paid_filter_contract: WAIT_BUYER_PAY trades are excluded from paid order count, total amount, and normalized orders
implementation_evidence.orders_raw_contract: normalized API orders include unique_key, 数据来源=api, shop fields, order id, status, payment, fetched time, and raw data
implementation_evidence.failure_no_zero: API failures return order_count=null, paid_order_count=null, total_amount=null, raw=null

evidence.summary: Added page-aware injectable API fetch boundary while preserving credential fail-closed behavior for the real non-mock path.

Covers ORDER_SOURCE=api factory switch, crawler default nonblocking credentials, API credential failure semantics, pagination, paid filtering, normalized order shape, upstream exception handling, and no-zero failure.
REQ-003 API boundary proof recorded; Taobao API credentials are absent but nonblocking for current crawler MVP.
Guard exited 1 because pre-existing T01 logs contain literal '=missing' diagnostic values for secret env vars; no T05 code secret was identified.

limitations.summary: Project secret_guard.py treats literal diagnostic values such as TAOBAO_APP_SECRET=missing in prior T01 logs as secret hits. T05 did not modify scripts or rewrite prior task evidence.
Real Taobao Open Platform API request/response proof is intentionally deferred by REQ-003 and is not required for current crawler-first MVP acceptance.

next_actions: When the project is ready for official Taobao API mode, provide real Taobao Open Platform credentials in a secure environment and bind the page fetcher to the actual SDK/client.
In a separate guard-maintenance task, update scripts/acceptance/secret_guard.py or prior diagnostic logs so literal '=missing' values do not fail secret scans.
